sessionTasks.title: Build Agents Live Tracker Page
sessionTasks.summary: Added /agents page to NovaroHQ dashboard — live task tracker with click-to-detail panels, completed history, and scheduled automations view.
sessionTasks.details: Built and deployed the Agents page on novarohq.com. Features: (1) Live stats bar showing tasks completed today, in-progress count, and active automations. (2) LIVE NOW section with animated pulse showing actively running tasks in real-time. (3) COMPLETED TODAY table — all session tasks with type, trigger, start time, duration, and outcome. Every row is clickable and opens a full detail panel with summary, results, and page navigation. (4) SCHEDULED AUTOMATIONS section — all automated tasks from task-status.json with their schedule, last run time, status, and computed next run time. Also clickable with full detail panels showing summaries. Page reads from agents-log.json (session tasks) and task-status.json (automations) on GitHub and auto-refreshes on page load.
